debug_info.goal:
f g : ℝ → ℝ
h₀ : ∀ (x y : ℝ), f (x + y) + f (x - y) = 2 * f x * g y
h₁ : ¬∀ (x : ℝ), f x = 0
h₂ : ∀ (x : ℝ), |f x| ≤ 1
⊢ ∀ (x : ℝ), |g x| ≤ 1

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
have h₃ : ∃ x, f x ≠ 0 := by
    by_contra h
    push_neg at h
    have h₄ : ∀ x, f x = 0 := by
      intro x
      specialize h x
      by_cases h₅ : f x = 0
      · exact h₅
      · exfalso
        have h₆ : f x ≠ 0 := h₅
        have h₇ : f x = 0 := h x
        contradiction
    exact h₁ h₄
  
  have h₄ : ∀ y, |g y| ≤ 1 := by
    intro y
    have h₅ : ∃ x, f x ≠ 0 := h₃
    have h₆ : ∃ x, f x ≠ 0 := h₃
    -- Use the functional equation to relate g(y) to f
    have h₇ : ∀ x, f (x + y) + f (x - y) = 2 * f x * g y := h₀
    -- Choose x such that f(x) ≠ 0
    obtain ⟨x₀, hx₀⟩ := h₅
    have h₈ : f (x₀ + y) + f (x₀ - y) = 2 * f x₀ * g y := h₇ x₀
    -- Use the bound on f to get a bound on g(y)
    have h₉ : |f (x₀ + y)| ≤ 1 := h₂ (x₀ + y)
    have h₁₀ : |f (x₀ - y)| ≤ 1 := h₂ (x₀ - y)
    have h₁₁ : |f x₀| ≤ 1 := h₂ x₀
    have h₁₂ : 0 < |f x₀| := abs_pos.mpr hx₀
    -- Use the triangle inequality to bound |2 * f x₀ * g y|
    have h₁₃ : |2 * f x₀ * g y| = 2 * |f x₀| * |g y| := by
      calc
        |2 * f x₀ * g y| = |2 * f x₀| * |g y| := by
          simp [abs_mul]
        _ = 2 * |f x₀| * |g y| := by
          simp [abs_mul, abs_of_nonneg (by norm_num : (2 : ℝ) ≥ 0)]
          <;> ring_nf
          <;> field_simp [abs_of_pos (by norm_num : (2 : ℝ) > 0)]
          <;> ring_nf
    -- Use the bounds on f to get a bound on |2 * f x₀ * g y|
    have h₁₄ : |f (x₀ + y) + f (x₀ - y)| ≤ 2 := by
      calc
        |f (x₀ + y) + f (x₀ - y)| ≤ |f (x₀ + y)| + |f (x₀ - y)| := abs_add (f (x₀ + y)) (f (x₀ - y))
        _ ≤ 1 + 1 := by
          gcongr <;> (try norm_num) <;> (try linarith [h₂ (x₀ + y), h₂ (x₀ - y)])
        _ = 2 := by norm_num
    -- Combine the inequalities to get |g y| ≤ 1
    have h₁₅ : 2 * |f x₀| * |g y| ≤ 2 := by
      calc
        2 * |f x₀| * |g y| = |2 * f x₀ * g y| := by
          rw [h₁₃]
          <;> ring_nf
        _ = |f (x₀ + y) + f (x₀ - y)| := by
          have h₁₆ : 2 * f x₀ * g y = f (x₀ + y) + f (x₀ - y) := by
            linarith [h₈]
          rw [h₁₆]
        _ ≤ 2 := h₁₄
    have h₁₆ : |g y| ≤ 1 := by
      have h₁₇ : 0 < |f x₀| := abs_pos.mpr hx₀
      have h₁₈ : 2 * |f x₀| * |g y| ≤ 2 := h₁₅
      have h₁₉ : |f x₀| ≤ 1 := h₁₁
      have h₂₀ : 2 * |f x₀| > 0 := by positivity
      have h₂₁ : |g y| ≤ 1 := by
        calc
          |g y| = (2 * |f x₀| * |g y|) / (2 * |f x₀|) := by
            field_simp [h₂₀.ne']
            <;> ring_nf
            <;> field_simp [h₁₇.ne']
            <;> ring_nf
          _ ≤ 2 / (2 * |f x₀|) := by
            gcongr
            <;> nlinarith
          _ = 1 / |f x₀| := by
            field_simp [h₂₀.ne']
            <;> ring_nf
            <;> field_simp [h₁₇.ne']
            <;> ring_nf
          _ ≤ 1 := by
            have h₂₂ : |f x₀| ≥ |f x₀| := le_refl (|f x₀|)
            have h₂₃ : 1 / |f x₀| ≤ 1 := by
              have h₂₄ : |f x₀| ≥ 0 := abs_nonneg (f x₀)
              have h₂₅ : |f x₀| ≤ 1 := h₁₁
              have h₂₆ : 1 / |f x₀| ≤ 1 := by
                apply (div_le_iff (by positivity)).mpr
                nlinarith [abs_nonneg (f x₀)]
              exact h₂₆
            linarith
      exact h₂₁
    exact h₁₆
  
  exact h₄
